title: Resume Variant Registry
description: Config-driven map of job-title lanes to pre-authored resume files. Read by src/job_hunt/resume_registry.py; never auto-rewritten.

default_variant.description: id of the variant used when no specialized lane clears the minimum confidence.

title_patterns.description: Lowercase substrings matched against the lead title. Empty array = wildcard (default lane).

resume_path.description: Repo-relative path to the ATS-passing resume markdown for this lane.

review_status.description: Authoring state. Optional; absent is treated as 'draft'. A lane marked 'ready' must have its resume file present AND at least one approved claim allowed for it (enforced by profile-doctor).
